titleStmt.title: SII 24.248: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 248. (A.R. No. 99 of 1937-38.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers another sale of land by Nalantigaḻ Nārāyaṇa Amudiṉār of Kuḍavāyil, to the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. The record belongs to the 4th year of the king but the details quoted viz. Kuṁbha, ba. 9, Monday, Uttiraṭṭādi are irregular. The combination of Navami and Uttiraṭṭādi in Kuṁbha is impossible.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulaśekhara tevarkku yāṇṭu 4vatu nālāvatu kumbhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttaraṭṭāti nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷil kuṭavāyil nalan
tikaḻ nārāyaṇa Amutināreṉ tiruṉantavaṉa nilavilai pramāṇam Ittirup patiyil kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku Iṟṟaināḷāl nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta tirunantavaṉamāvatu tirukkuṟaippaṟṟu teṉṉoḻukil Eṉṉutāṉa tiruṉantavaṉattukku Icainta kiḻpārkkellai tiruppāṟkaṭal dāsan
tiruṉantavanattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai tiruveṅkaṭadāsan tiruṉanta vaṉattukku vaṭakkum mi(ra)pārkkellai meṟpaṭiyāṉ tiruṉantavaṉattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai tirumuṭikkuṟaikku perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikkut teṟkkum Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷ mikutikkuṟai Uṭpaṭa Uṇ ṭu tiruṉantavaṉam kol 3(1/2) Ittiruṉantavanam kol muṉṟaraiyum Iṟṟai nāḷāl nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicaiṉta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅkum nallirāci
pa4 10 5 Ippaṇam ṉāṟpattaiñcum Āḷaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutte[ ṉ kodaṇḍa] rāma ccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku nalantikaḻnārāyaṇa Amutaṉāreṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ittiruṉantavaṉattil melṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāgamum bhāgāśrayamum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭutta Ittiruṉantavaṉam kol muṉṟaraikkum Ippaṇam ṉāṟpattaiñcume vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷ māva
ṟutip poruṭ celavolai Āvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poru[ṭRead ‘poruḷ’māvaṟuti] pporuṭ celavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku kuṭavāyil nalan tikaḻnārāyaṇa Amutaṉāreṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṭavāyil Āḻvārāṉa nalantikaḻnārāyaṇa Amutiṉār Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirunaṟaiyūr dāsaṉeṉ §
muṉpaṟiyāta perumāḷ tirunantavaṉattil vaṭakkil Ellaikku vaṭakkum Ittirunaṟaiyūr dāsan tirunaṉtavaṉattukku kiḻakkum kāveri niroṭu kālukkut teṟkkum kiḻmel tāṅkaḷ vilaikoṇṭa pramāṇappaṭi ke kku viḷai nilamum Akavāyāṟṟuppaṭukai niroṭukālum tu kaṇṭa kuḻi 1000 6 10- m Ippaṟṟil Inta Ellaikkuk kiḻakku teviyār Akarattār
Akarattu nāyaṉār koyilukkum taṅkaḷukkum kāṇiyākavum tānādhamanavikra yaṅkaḷukkum Urittāvatākavum Ippaṭikku ccandrādityavat celvatākavum kalli lum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷākavum coṉṉom Ivai śrī vaikunta dāsan Eḻuttu § Ivai paṇiyāl koyil kaṇakku putucceri Uṭaiyāṉ pallavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai piṟakuvāḷi Aḻakiyaperumāḷ
dāsan Eḻuttu § Ivai śrī raṅganārāyaṇadāssya § Ivai paccaivāraṇa dāsan Eḻuttu § Ivai teṉṉavaṉ brahmārāyaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai śrīraṅganārāyaṇadāssya § Ivai tirumaṅkai nampi Eḻuttu § Ivai tiruccolaippiccaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai tirunaṟaiyūr dāsan Eḻuttu § Ivai śrīraṅganārāyaṇabrahmārāyaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai tiru
māliruñcolai brahmārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai koyil kāttaperumāḷnampi Eḻuttu § Ivai Uttamanampi Eḻuttu § kulaśekharadāsan samjñaiyāṉ maikku Ivai piṟakuvāḷi Aḻakiyaperumāḷdāsan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
